title: Nakhal Heat Wave
lead: Nakhal is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.83. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Nakhal has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 18%, and the wind speed is approximately 8.6 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The Heat Wave has significant implications for various sectors, including agriculture, logistics, and energy.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave in Nakhal.
